name: salesdoc
description: Monorepo: bitta buyruqda API + web panel

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npx kill-port 4000 && npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run ports:free && npm run clean --prefix frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:alt: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "cross-env PORT=4001 npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- -p 3010"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
